layer_1_rules.title: New Tax Regime is Default from AY2024-25
affected_fields: notes (slab rates, standard deduction, rebate limit)
layer_1_rules.change_required: Update slab thresholds, standard deduction, rebate limit in notes. Increment MINOR version. If the default nature of the regime changes, increment MAJOR.

layer_2_decisions.title: Which tax regime is optimal?
layer_2_decisions.change_required: Recompute comparison logic. If slab rates or standard deduction changed, the breakeven point shifts. Update D-002 description and computation examples.

layer_2_decisions.title: What is the refund or tax due?
layer_2_decisions.change_required: Slab rate changes directly affect tax liability computation. Update any hardcoded examples.

layer_3_decision_trees.change_required: Update slab thresholds in any node conditions referencing specific income amounts.

layer_5_cases.title: Salary + Gig Income → ITR-4, New Regime
layer_5_cases.change_required: Recompute tax_liability, refund_amount in case.json and rewrite explanation.md tax computation table.

layer_6_tests.change_required: Update expected tax output if slabs changed. Add new boundary tests at updated slab thresholds.

layer_7_prompts.change_required: Update all slab values in the computation template. Update standard_deduction and rebate_87A_limit values.

update_procedure: 1. Read the Finance Act amendment — identify new slab rates, standard deduction, rebate limit, and effective AY.
2. Update SEC-004 in section-registry.json: all key_thresholds, last_amended_by, last_amended_date.
3. Create CH-XXXX.json change entries for each affected object.
4. Update R-0005: update notes with new slab values, increment MINOR version. If default status changes, increment MAJOR.
5. Update D-002 description and any computation examples that reference old slab values.
6. Update DT-002 if any nodes contain hardcoded income thresholds.
7. Update C-000001: recompute case.json final_output and rewrite explanation.md tax table.
8. Update T-0008: update expected_output with new tax computation.
9. Add new boundary tests: one at each new slab threshold, one at rebate limit.
10. Update P-002: all slab values in the computation template.
11. Run all tests. All affected tests must pass before marking update complete.
13. Git commit: '[SEC-004] Finance Act YYYY — Section 115BAC slab update (AY-XXXX-XX)'
